My family has pledged to support me in my academic endeavors from the outset, having already deposited the full sum of my first year's tuition into a personal account I possess. My father, a prominent wholesaler in the field of automobile parts, has his own store located bazaar. Moreover, my family owns our home, some apartment in different parts of our county. So, as I highly motivated to setting up my own business, they are totally supporting me to reach my goal.

"My family has pledged to support me in my academic endeavors by depositing the full sum of my first year's tuition into a personal account. My father is a prominent wholesaler in the field of automobile parts and owns a store located in the bazaar. We also possess some apartments in different parts of our county, and since I am highly motivated to start my own business, my family is fully supporting me to achieve my goal."
